information: Employees can work from home up to 3 days per week.
The main office is open from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.
Dental and Vision coverage are included in the Gold plan.
Business travel must be pre-approved. Mileage is reimbursed at $0.67 per mile as of 2026.
Each employee has a $2500 annual budget for certifications and conferences.
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory for all GCP and internal platform access.
Platform teams follow a weekly rotation. On-call engineers receive a $500 weekly stipend.
The main office is dog-friendly on Fridays for well-behaved pets with up-to-date vaccinations.
Laptops are eligible for an upgrade every 3 years. Standard issue is a 32GB RAM workstation.
Employees are entitled to 12 weeks of paid parental leave for the birth or adoption of a child.
Employees may use approved LLMs for coding assistance but must not paste sensitive client data.
A $3000 bonus is paid for successful hires referred by current employees after 90 days of service.
The office follows a "Smart Casual" dress code. Formal attire is only required for client-facing meetings.
Annual performance reviews are conducted in December. Mid-year check-ins occur in June.
Employees accrue 15 days of paid vacation (PTO) per year which can be rolled over for up to 2 years. PTO is the same as paid time off or vacation days.
Employees working remotely are eligible for a $100 monthly stipend to cover home office expenses.
Employees accrue 18 days of paid vacation (PTO) per year as of 2026 . This applies to all full-time employees.
Employees can work from home up to 4 days per week as of 2026.
Basic medical coverage only in 2024.
Parental leave extended to 16 weeks paid as of 2026.
